title: Ty the Tasmanian Tiger 2
notes: Wholly playable, some performance drops compared to running on Windows, no working controller support.

Runs perfectly! PS4 controller works for me when I connect it through USB and disable controller support in steam. The game can stutter a bit at first when loading stuff for the first time as the same with any other proton compatible game.
